prerequisites.value: Starry Grace, worshiper of the associated deity.

description.value:
**Benefit:** You can empower a starknife with magical power once per day per character level as a swift action. Until the end of your turn, add your Wisdom modifier to your damage rolls with the starknife in addition to any other modifiers you normally add. If you throw the starknife during that time, it returns to you at the beginning of your next turn (as per the returning weapon

**Special:** ability).
